mapper.insert: insert into users (id, username, password, email, bio, image) values ( #{user.id}, #{user.username}, #{user.password}, #{user.email}, #{user.bio}, #{user.image} )
mapper.update: update users set email = #{user.email}, username = #{user.username}, password = #{user.password}, bio = #{user.bio}, image = #{user.image} where id = #{user.id}
mapper.delete: delete from follows where user_id = #{followRelation.userId} and follow_id = #{followRelation.targetId}
